trust_boundaries.name: Public Internet to Container
trust_boundaries.description: HTTP traffic from external users/attackers to the Express application on port 3000. No authentication, no TLS, no rate limiting at the application level.

trust_boundaries.name: Container to Host
trust_boundaries.description: Container boundary between the application process and the host OS. Container runs as root (no USER directive in Dockerfile), so container escape would yield host root access.

trust_boundaries.name: Application to Data Layer
trust_boundaries.description: In-process boundary between Express application logic and the Sequelize ORM/database. SQL injection risk if raw queries are used.
